      Juggling Multiple Roles

      Struggling to juggle multiple roles, from healthcare provider to business manager.

      Bad Experience w/Agency

      Dealing with the aftermath of a bad experience with a previous marketing agency.

      Being Overwhelmed

      Feeling overwhelmed by the daily demands and responsibilities of running a practice.

      Empty Waiting Areas

      Seeing empty waiting areas as a result of low patient inflow.

      Increased Competition

      Struggling to stand out in an increasingly competitive healthcare market.

      Low or Stagnant Revenue

      Experiencing revenue decline due to various operational and market challenges.

      How our SKLS Method works?

      We identify customer pain points, create engaging content, and prepare for ads and website optimization.

      STEP #2: Get Known

      The SKLS method is our secret weapon that we use that helps your hospital grow at an unprecedented rate.

      STEP #1: Get Set

      We understand your hospital, analyze competitors, define your niche, and set up your profiles and systems.

      We launch lead generation ads, create lead magnets, build community through webinars & email/WhatsApp marketing.

      STEP #3: Get Leads

      STEP #2: Get Known

      We identify customer pain points, create engaging content, and prepare for ads and website optimization.

      We analyze data, implement OKR & KPI systems, and focus on customer loyalty and retention to drive sales.

      About Our Company

      Empowering Healthcare Growth with Innovation, Care, and Connection.

      Our Vision

      Our vision is to be the leading global digital marketing partner for healthcare, enhancing patient engagement and operational efficiency

      Our Mission

      At Vivada Infotech, our mission is to help Doctors & Hospitals increase their OPDs & occupancy by 20-25% through innovative marketing strategies

      Our Values

      We believe in values that are very core to Humanity and those are Creativity, Connectivity, Commitment, Consistency & finally Care!
